svg:
SƠ ĐỒ ERD - HỆ THỐNG KẾT NỐI Y TẾ
Entity Relationship Diagram - Kết nối Bệnh nhân và Sinh viên Y khoa
USERS
🔑 id INT PK name VARCHAR(150) email VARCHAR(255) UQ email_verified TINYINT facebook_id VARCHAR(64) password VARCHAR(255) role ENUM(patient,student) bio TEXT location VARCHAR(255) phone VARCHAR(50) avatar VARCHAR(255) student_id VARCHAR(100) verified TINYINT is_admin TINYINT can_post TINYINT last_login, last_activity
POSTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK title VARCHAR(255) content TEXT type ENUM(recruitment, application) category VARCHAR(100) area VARCHAR(255) contact_info VARCHAR(255) card_image VARCHAR(255) student_fullname student_code, student_class recruiter_fullname suggested_price INT status ENUM, created_at
< !-- ========== ENTITY: MESSAGES ========== -->
MESSAGES
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 from_user INT FK 🔗 to_user INT FK 🔗 post_id INT FK (nullable) message TEXT created_at TIMESTAMP
COMMENTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 post_id INT FK 🔗 user_id INT FK 🔗 parent_id INT FK (self) comment TEXT is_hidden TINYINT created_at TIMESTAMP
FAVORITES
🔑 user_id INT PK,FK 🔑 post_id INT PK,FK created_at TIMESTAMP
RATINGS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 rater_id INT FK 🔗 rated_id INT FK score TINYINT (1-5) comment TEXT created_at TIMESTAMP
VERIFICATIONS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK full_name VARCHAR(150) student_code VARCHAR(100) class_name VARCHAR(100) address, phone document_card VARCHAR document_internship status ENUM, admin_note
REPORTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 reporter_id INT FK target_type ENUM target_id INT 🔗 post_id INT FK 🔗 reported_user_id FK reason_code VARCHAR(50) custom_reason, message status ENUM, admin_note
CONVERSATIONS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user1_id INT FK 🔗 user2_id INT FK last_message_at created_at TIMESTAMP
DIRECT_MESSAGES
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 conversation_id FK 🔗 sender_id INT FK message TEXT created_at TIMESTAMP
FRIENDSHIPS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK 🔗 friend_id INT FK status ENUM(pending, accepted,blocked) created_at, accepted_at
APPOINTMENTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 patient_id INT FK 🔗 student_id INT FK 🔗 post_id INT FK scheduled_at DATETIME status ENUM(pending, confirmed,completed...)
EMAIL_VERIFICATIONS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK token VARCHAR(128) UQ expires_at DATETIME used_at DATETIME created_at TIMESTAMP
POSTING_REQUESTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK full_name VARCHAR(150) student_code VARCHAR(100) class_name VARCHAR(100) address VARCHAR(255) document_card, internship status ENUM, admin_note
< !-- ========== ENTITY: ACCOUNT_REQUESTS ========== -->
ACCOUNT_REQUESTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK request_type ENUM (delete,update,other) details TEXT status ENUM admin_note, processed_at
USER_FEEDBACK
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK subject VARCHAR(255) message TEXT status ENUM(pending, in_progress,resolved)
KNOWLEDGE_POSTS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK title VARCHAR(255) content TEXT approved TINYINT
FAQS
🔑 id INT PK question VARCHAR(255) answer TEXT created_at, updated_at
PASSWORD_RESETS
🔑 id INT PK 🔗 user_id INT FK token VARCHAR(128) UQ expires_at DATETIME used_at DATETIME
1:N
1:N
0:N
1:N
1:N
N:M
N:N
1:N
1:N
N:N
1:N
N:N
1:N
1:N
1:N
1:N
CHÚ THÍCH (LEGEND)
🔑 PK = Primary Key (Khóa chính)
🔗 FK = Foreign Key (Khóa ngoại)
UQ = Unique (Duy nhất)
Quan hệ:
1:N (Một - Nhiều)
N:M (Nhiều - Nhiều)
Màu Entity:
Users/Core
Posts/Content
Messages
Requests
THỐNG KÊ • Tổng số bảng: 17 entities • Bảng trung tâm: USERS (liên kết 15+ bảng)
Hệ thống Kết nối Y tế - Entity Relationship Diagram
